qas.q: True or False: When possible, it is best to always travel with a cell phone. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 2)
True or False: In the event of a skyjacking, you should immediately attempt to subdue the skyjackers. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 4)
True or False: The ticketing area is more secure than the area beyond the security check point. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 3)
Keeping a well-maintained vehicle is considered a "best practice" from both a security and safety perspective. True or False? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 2)
True or False: Internet acquaintances can pose a security threat and should be carefully monitored. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 5)
Force Protection Condition DELTA means that your base is at which one of the following? (Introduction to Antiterrorism, Page 10)
qas.a: The most increased level of protection

qas.q: Which of the following is NOT a recommended response to an active shooter incident? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Pages 3 and 4)
qas.a: Provide instructions to arriving emergency response personnel

qas.q: Which one of the following is NOT an early indicator of a potential insider threat? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 3)
qas.a: A reasonable disagreement with a US Government policy (correct)

qas.q: Which of the following have NOT been targeted or plotted against by terrorists or violent individuals? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 1)
True or False: Terrorists usually avoid tourist locations since they are not DOD-related. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 1)
Home security can be improved with self-help measures like changing locks, securing windows, and improving outdoor lighting. True or False? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 2)
Select all factors that are ways in which you might become the victim of a terrorist attack. (Introduction to Antiterrorism, Page 4)
Alerts from the National Terrorism Advisory System apply only to the United States and its possessions. (Introduction to Antiterrorism, Page 12)
Electronic audio and video devices are never used by terrorists for surveillance purposes. True or False? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 4)
True or False: The initial moments of a hostage taking incident can be extremely dangerous. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 2)
If you identify a possible surveillance attempt you should try to handle the situation yourself. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 2)
Persons who have been given access to an installation can be counted on to be of no threat. True or False? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 3)
True or False: Room invasions are a significant security issue for hotels located in CONUS. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 1)
True or False: Room invasions are not a significant security issue for hotels located within the United States.
True or False: In an active shooter incident involving firearms you should immediately lie on the ground. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 2)
Which one of these is NOT a physical security feature you should check when inspecting your hotel room? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 4)
From the following choices, select the factors you should consider to understand the threat in your environment. (Introduction to Antiterrorism, Page 3)
True or False: Everyone on an installation has shared responsibility for security. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 2)
IEDs may come in many forms and may be camouflaged to blend in to the surrounding environment. True or False? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 3)
Knowing indicators of an unstable person can allow you to identify a potential insider threat before an incident. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 4)
What should you NOT do during a hostage rescue attempt? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 4)
qas.a: Try to assist hostage rescue team

qas.q: Early symptoms of a biological attack may appear the same as common illnesses. True or False? (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 2)
True or False: Security is a team effort.
True or False: Surveillance can be performed through either stationary or mobile means. (Antiterrorism Scenario Training, Page 3)
From an antiterrorism perspective, espionage and security negligence are not considered insider threats.
True or False: Individuals should Fight as last resort and only when your life is in imminent danger.
What is the most increased Force Protection Level for a base/installation?
True or False: From a security perspective, the best rooms are directly next to emergency exits.
True or False: State Department Travel Warnings should be consulted prior to taking trips across the US-Mexican border.
Which one of these is a possible indicator of a suspicious letter or package?
True or False: Reasons for acquiring hostages include publicity, use as a bargaining chip while executing other crimes, the forcing of political concessions, and ransom.
What is NOT a terrorist method of surveillance?
qas.a: Breaking and entering to steal valuables

qas.q: Which one of these does NOT pose a risk to security at a government facility?
qas.a: A person expressing boredom with the US mission

qas.q: Which of the following are NOT an Antiterrorism Level I theme?
